title: Surprise money is on its way
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for building expectation of unexpected income.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 33 of the MONEY program for when windfalls feel like something that happens to other people.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 33 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 33 of the MONEY program. Said consistently in the morning, it builds the expectation of surprise income as a normal part of the financial picture.
Surprise money is on its way. I am ready to receive it.

Say it three times in the morning. The point is the expectation, not a prediction: building the belief that unexpected income is a thing that happens to you, not a category of luck that belongs elsewhere.
Adapted from Day 33 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
